title: macrosolen psilanthus
intro: Macrosolen psilanthus, also known as the Indian cork tree, is a plant species native to India. It is a medicinal plant used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Macrosolen psilanthus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infused in oils for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
